name: pr-splitting

interface.shortDescription: Use when a finished working branch needs to be broken into smaller non-stacked pull requests, preferring feature-firs...
interface.longDescription: Use when a finished working branch needs to be broken into smaller non-stacked pull requests, preferring feature-first slices and falling back to layer-based buckets when feature seams are too entangled.
